meaning: Drive Self Test,驱动器自我测试
examples: In fact, in some regions, DST could actually cause the consumption of more energy.
DST just made one night seem a little longer, since everyone else slept in for that extra hour.
John Alkire of Morgan Stanley believes that adopting DST would mean a new dawn for the Japanese economy.
So you'd think that publicly traded DST would be the belle of the bear market.
Good news for the stock:DST is reportedly looking to sell its cable billing operations.
